violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Cold sandwiches made in store and portioned containers of potato salad found without dates/labels. Stored in multiple coolers around store.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - White tape was placed on the edges of the stainless steel prep table between the counter and prep cooler

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Fans in walk-in cooler in need of cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Filters under hood in need of cleaning.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
